cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists battles cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists bosses cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists characters cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists deck_characters cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists decks cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_characters cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table battle_turns (damage_dealt integer, turn_number integer, actor_id bigint, battle_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, target_id bigint, action_description varchar(500), action_type enum ('ATTACK','DESPERATION','FOCUS','PHASE_EVENT','SKILL'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table battles (boss_current_hp integer, is_hardcore boolean, reward_claimed boolean, team_current_hp integer, turns_taken integer, boss_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6), deck_id bigint not null, ended_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, battle_state_json TEXT, reward_options_json TEXT, result enum ('DRAW','IN_PROGRESS','LOSE','WIN'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table bosses (attack integer, defense integer, hardcore_multiplier float(53), max_hp integer, speed integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, description varchar(500), image_url varchar(512), name varchar(255), difficulty enum ('EASY','HARD','LEGENDARY','MEDIUM'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table characters (attack integer, defense integer, is_playable boolean, max_hp integer, speed integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, image_url varchar(512), faction varchar(255), name varchar(255), passive_key varchar(255), passive_value varchar(255), rarity enum ('COMMON','EPIC','LEGENDARY','RARE'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table deck_characters (character_id bigint not null, deck_id bigint not null, primary key (character_id, deck_id)) Hibernate: create table decks (is_active boolean, slot_number integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table user_characters (ability_upgrade_index integer, duplicate_count integer, level integer, character_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, unlocked_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table users (energy integer not null, welcome_pull_claimed boolean, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, last_daily_pull_at timestamp(6), last_energy_update timestamp(6), username varchar(50) not null unique, email varchar(100) not null unique, password_hash varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ADMIN','PLAYER') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists battle_turns add constraint FKjtylyg37pq9smkh3t74v1jmec foreign key (battle_id) references battles Hibernate: alter table if exists battles add constraint FK6mqoy074e4map31scc01rbsc5 foreign key (boss_id) references bosses Hibernate: alter table if exists battles add constraint FKfutkfn0m6m6vij57wbmx7il8y foreign key (deck_id) references decks Hibernate: alter table if exists battles add constraint FKr6or1oaarm9c2w6efa2moaks0 foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists deck_characters add constraint FK9mpeho7anxjdvka4jhb67lbvm foreign key (character_id) references characters Hibernate: alter table if exists deck_characters add constraint FKk25sgypqcgix4qjoye0t9evw9 foreign key (deck_id) references decks Hibernate: alter table if exists decks add constraint FKj0ey511pphfxbxbh8ri1616uv foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists user_characters add constraint FK7ajwu1hu3crrmmpu0m5uy1gyp foreign key (character_id) references characters Hibernate: alter table if exists user_characters add constraint FKrbc83ct95gaoxhuv2t19dp05d testcase.name: login_shouldFail_whenPasswordInvalid

error.message: I/O error on POST request for "http://localhost:64874/api/auth/login": cannot retry due to server authentication, in streaming mode

testcase.error: org.springframework.web.client.ResourceAccessException: I/O error on POST request for "http://localhost:64874/api/auth/login": cannot retry due to server authentication, in streaming mode at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.createResourceAccessException(RestTemplate.java:915) at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.doExecute(RestTemplate.java:895) at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.execute(RestTemplate.java:790) at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.postForEntity(RestTemplate.java:538) at authentication, in streaming mode at java.base/sun.net.www.protocol.http.HttpURLConnection.getInputStream0(HttpURLConnection.java:1796) at
